zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip de Orreby I於1160年出生在英國英格蘭爾切斯特時，他的父親Herbert de Orreby V20歲，母親Agnes Kyme18歲。他於1189年與Emma de Coventry在英國英格蘭爾阿爾德福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1230年在英國英格蘭爾享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Orreby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Orry
meanings: English: variant of   Orrey  ;  see  Urry  .

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

en.lifeSummary: When Philip de Orreby I was born in 1160, in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Herbert de Orreby V, was 20 and his mother, Agnes Kyme, was 18. He married Emma de Coventry in 1189, in Aldford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1230, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

Il a épousé Emma de Coventry en 1189, à Aldford, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1230, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip de Orreby Iが1160年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで生まれた時，父Herbert de Orreby Vは20歳，母Agnes Kymeは18歳であった。1189年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアルドフォードでEmma de Coventryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1230年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip de Orreby I(이)가 1160년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Herbert de Orreby V(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Kyme(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1189년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 알드퍼드에서 Emma de Coventry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.
